arts.ttl: Virgil van Dijk Had no Doubts When Asked to Name His Best-Ever Celtic Teammate
arts.sum: Liverpool legend Virgil van Dijk, one of the greatest defenders in history, hailed a Norway international as the best teammate he ever had at Celtic.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United have something Liverpool can only dream of - and he can become a legend - John Gibson - Chronicle Live
arts.sum: As he walks upon Wembley, Isak is already demanding a place in Newcastle United history. If stats determine the stature of a striker, if figures place him in the pecking order of history, then Alexander Isak is well on his way to living among giants.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United transfer watchlist released, Isak's historic contract offer and Cabaye message
arts.sum: Alexander Isak's contract discussions are booked in for the end of the season at St James' Park with Newcastle United increasingly confident of the player agreeing to a new bumper deal. Suggestions that Callum Wilson will leave at the end of the season will clear up to £5million per year off the wage the bill and there could well be other departures for fringe players such as Matt Targett and Odysseas Vlachodimos to make more headroom ahead of the summer window.

arts.ttl: Barcelona's stance on Luis Diaz emerges as Liverpool given transfer conundrum
arts.sum: Luis Diaz has just two years remaining on his Liverpool contract and the club could be tempted to cash in on the Colombian amid "genuine" interest from La Liga giants Barcelona

arts.ttl: Mohamed Salah set for dream Liverpool Carabao Cup scenario after Newcastle blow
arts.sum: Mohamed Salah will be key for Liverpool in the Carabao Cup final on Sunday and Newcastle United will be without their best chance of stopping him

arts.ttl: Liverpool 'win' transfer battle against Newcastle United for Premier League centre-back as Virgil van Dijk exit looms
arts.sum: Liverpool are ahead of Newcastle United in the race to sign a Premier League centre-back in the summer transfer window amidst uncertainty regarding Virgil van Dijk.

arts.ttl: Last chance for Darwin Núñez to turn laughter into legacy at Liverpool
arts.sum: Carabao Cup final offers Liverpool’s entertaining and erratic forward a chance to write himself into club folklore The prevailing sensation while watching El Chavo del Ocho is to wonder how this thing ever got made in the first place. It’s a low-budget Mexican sitcom that ran from the 70s to the 90s, centred on an eight-year-old orphan who lives in a barrel in an apartment complex. The boy is played by Roberto Gómez Bolaños, who was in his 40s when the series began and his 60s when it ended. Pretty much all the humour is derived from slapstick: situational farce, physical jokes, people getting their heads trapped in buckets. That kind of thing. Try to imagine ChuckleVision gone global, to the point where it was a genuine cultural touchstone for hundreds of millions, to the point where Paul and Barry Chuckle have a star on the Hollywood Walk of Fame and are unable to walk through Manhattan without being mobbed. That’s El Chavo. Even today it remains one of the most famous comic creations in the history of television: syndicated across the Americas, enthralling successive generations long after it was decommissioned. Including – at some point in early 2000s Uruguay – a young Darwin Núñez. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Newcastle captain Bruno Guimaraes hopes to make good on promise he made to fans
arts.sum: Newcastle United take on Liverpool in the Carabao Cup final at Wembley on Sunday afternoon and Magpies captain Bruno Guimaraes is dreaming of lifting the trophy

arts.ttl: Newcastle receive boost in their efforts to keep key star amid transfer rumours
arts.sum: Bruno Guimaraes will not push for a move away from Newcastle United despite interest from rivals. The Brazilian international’s future has been a massive talking point in recent weeks. While there is still over three years left on his deal at the Tyneside club, he has been linked with a move away. According to a […] The post Newcastle receive boost in their efforts to keep key star amid transfer rumours appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Liverpool transfer news update: Summer window latest as Reds 'interested' in ex-Manchester City attacker to replace Darwin Nunez
arts.sum: The agent of an ex-Manchester City attacker claims that Liverpool held interest in signing the forward last summer and refuses to rule out the possibility of a move.
